title: rubus acanthopodus
intro: Rubus acanthopodus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the genus Rubus, which includes blackberries and raspberries. The medicinal properties of Rubus acanthopodus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Rubus acanthopodus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, among other ailments.
